idea_ref: [P3.META] LLM basis-axis meta-learner: logistic regression on 0073 logits + 0091 basis prediction
hypothesis: RoBERTa excels at goal axis (100%) but fails pe. Qwen-3B basis-only accuracy is 85.5%, complementary signal. A logistic regression stacker combining 0073 logit features + LLM binary basis prediction should improve macro-F1, especially pe recall.
